issue_body_preview:
Fixes https://trello.com/c/nTY5SgpH/1008-new-ui-calling-instancesetcolorpalette-will-blow-the-app-up

However, when users customize the pallete for a specific tool, the new UI will still show the default colors 
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/10825527/85910618-c8eac400-b7d4-11
test_description_zh: 调用 instance.setColorPalette API 为特定工具自定义调色板颜色，然后打开该工具的颜色选择面板，观察显示的颜色是否为自定义设置的颜色。
expected_result_zh: 调用 setColorPalette 后，应用不会崩溃，且对应工具的颜色选择面板应正确显示用户自定义的调色板颜色，而非默认颜色。
